items.headline: Giverny Capital Asset Management Sold Ametek (AME) Due to Valuation Gap
items.summary: Giverny Capital Asset Management, LLC, an investment management company, recently published its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy can be downloaded here. The model portfolio fell 6.88% this quarter, compared to the S&P 500’s 4.33% decline. Over the past year, the portfolio gained 8.52%, while the index increased by 17.80%. Geopolitical conflicts and inflation concerns drove […]
